# NIP-62 Reference Card

Kind 62: Request to Vanish. Required tags: relay (or ALL_RELAYS for global request). Optional: content (reason or note). JSON example: {"kind": 62, "pubkey": "<32-byte hex-encoded public key>", "tags": [["relay", "<relay url>"]], "content": "<reason or note>"}. Filter pattern: kind:62, relay:<relay url> or relay:ALL_RELAYS.
